title: riegan.dev
description: Personal website of Ganjar Muhammad Parikesit, a Fullstack Software Engineer in Yogyakarta, Indonesia with a cybersecurity background.

home.headline: Fullstack Software Engineer with a security-first mindset.
home.summary: I build reliable web systems across React, TypeScript, Rust, tRPC, Tailwind CSS, and Python, shaped by a cybersecurity background and a preference for pragmatic engineering.
home.availability: Open to selected fullstack and security-aware product engineering work.

contact.headline: Build with someone who can move across product, code, and security context.
contact.body: For hiring, collaboration, or technical conversations, email me directly or reach me through LinkedIn and GitHub.

seo.homeDescription: Ganjar Muhammad Parikesit, known online as riegan, is a Fullstack Software Engineer in Yogyakarta, Indonesia with a cybersecurity background.
seo.blogDescription: Engineering notes, cybersecurity learning, and software development writing from riegan.
